rule.statement: Bootstrap is safe to re-run; each step checks current state and skips if matching.

rationale.source: Idempotent IaC pattern; ansible / terraform conventions

rule.rationale: Idempotency turns the script into both bootstrap and drift-audit.

rule.statement: `gh` CLI is the primary tool; raw REST API only where `gh` lacks coverage.
rule.rationale: `gh` carries auth + retry + pagination logic; raw curl regresses each.

rule.statement: Merge mode is set to squash-only (no merge commits, no rebase merges).

rationale.source: GitHub merge methods docs; internal practice

rule.rationale: Linear history; easier bisect; one PR = one commit on main.

rule.statement: Default branch requires ≥1 human reviewer, all required status checks, no force-push, no deletion.
rule.rationale: Without protection any process is advisory.

rule.statement: Repo secrets go through `gh secret set`; never committed to repo, never logged in CI output.
rule.rationale: Secrets in env / repo files get leaked via logs, audits, fork crawlers.
